Pi detection implemented: app/hardware.py (is_raspberry_pi/board_model, cached, FOODASSISTANT_FORCE_MODEL hook) + firstboot.sh is_raspberry_pi() with FORCE_PI hook. Tests in tests/test_hardware.py (5 passing).

Mode-select wizard step + server plumbing done: data-driven cards filtered by host, /setup/mode persistence, /setup/test/remote, is_configured() relaxed for pi_remote, wizard skips Grocy/AI for remote. Tests in test_setup_mode.py.

Pi Remote thin-client install path done independently of the 92e.2 bootstrap-wizard piece: firstboot is_remote_mode() skips Docker+stack, installs only kiosk/Stream Deck pointed at REMOTE_SERVER_URL. 6 DRY_RUN tests pass. (Mode is pre-seeded via config.env/settings.json; on-device no-Docker wizard tracked in 92e.2.)

Added STEPS= env var to firstboot.sh; done-marker check bypassed, mark_done skipped. User can now run STEPS=streamdeck sudo bash firstboot.sh to provision just the Stream Deck. 3 new tests. 192 total.
QR modal moved to body level; backdrop and dismiss button now work correctly on all browsers.
Added _grocy_url_for_browser(): remote browsers now get a pre-filled URL using the host they used to reach FoodAssistant (same IP, port 9383) instead of localhost.
auto_hidden_groups() added to navigation.py; lock icon in navbar links to setup#pane-recipes; setup.html activates the matching pane via URL hash.
Confirmed: Mealie is fully wired in wizard step 5 and buildPayload(). auto_hidden_groups() now surfaces lock hints so users know Mealie unlocks Recipes/Cook/Mealplan/Shopping.

Added scanner_type picker (USB HID / Camera / unset) to wizard step 5 and Settings Inventory pane. USB mode shows a keyboard-wedge test field that validates barcode reception on Enter. scanner_type saved to settings.

Added color-coded status icons to sidebar pills (green=ok, yellow=needs attention, grey=optional-not-set) and a warning banner when Grocy or Security need attention. Progressive disclosure for Docker commands is a future iteration.

Replaced em-dashes with colons throughout CHANGELOG, README, all Python sources, templates, and shell scripts. Removed box-drawing separator chars from HTML/JS/CSS/Jinja2 comments. 40 files changed, 192 tests pass.

Pi Remote mode (pi_remote) fully implements this: DEPLOYMENT_MODE=pi_remote + REMOTE_SERVER_URL in config.env skips the local Docker stack, points kiosk and Stream Deck at the remote server. Documented in config.env and firstboot.sh.

Documented the Imager limitation in sd-image.md. Stock Pi OS is now the recommended primary path (full Imager customization). Pre-built image section notes the workaround. A bespoke solution (option b from the bead) is a future enhancement.

Added timer_1/2/3 countdown timer widget to Stream Deck. Presses cycle 5/10/15/30/60 min presets; key shows MM:SS live; expires with Done! alert in red. 3 independent timers can run simultaneously. Weather and HA entity control deferred to future iteration.

Audit complete. Chores/tasks/batteries/equipment out of scope. Filed FoodAssistant-5b1 (Grocy shopping list as Mealie fallback, P3) and FoodAssistant-75i (stock journal history view, P4). Recipes/shopping already covered by Mealie. Barcode lookup covered by Open Food Facts + LLM.
Implemented. Shopping tab always visible now; shows Grocy shopping list when Mealie not configured. Mealie path unchanged. New /grocy/shopping/* REST endpoints + GrocyClient methods.
Implemented. /ui/journal shows Grocy stock log with type badges, qty, filter, limit selector. Link added to inventory header.

Implemented. DISPLAY_ROTATION=N in config.env writes video=HDMI-A-1:rotate=N to cmdline.txt during firstboot. New foodassistant-set-rotation helper for post-provisioning updates. Documented in sd-image.md. 4 tests added (204 total passing).

All code-side blockers resolved. Version bumped to 1.6.0 with full CHANGELOG. Remaining manual step: 'git tag v1.6.0 && git push origin v1.6.0' triggers the release-image.yml CI to build and attach the .img.xz to the GitHub Release. Optionally make the GHCR package public for faster first-boot pulls.

Implemented as restock suggestions: products consumed recently (configurable look-back, default 30 days) that are now out of stock appear as a sidebar on the Grocy shopping page. One-click adds them to the list. /grocy/suggestions endpoint.

Implemented. foodassistant-accel-rotation script reads LSM6DSOX via smbus2, maps gravity axis to 0/90/180/270, calls foodassistant-set-rotation. firstboot.sh auto-detects the sensor via i2cdetect and installs the helper + smbus2. Axis-to-rotation mapping needs calibration against the actual mounting; see docstring.
External Recipes collapsible step added to wizard step 5: TheMealDB (free) or Spoonacular (API key). Wired into buildPayload().
Remote Access collapsible step added to wizard step 5: explains Cloudflare Tunnel and links to Settings pane-tunnel for full config.
About page: added donate/support panel with links to Grocy, Mealie, TheMealDB, Open Food Facts. Added two dependency cards (ZBar, python-elgato-streamdeck).

Follow-up x76 filed for capturing receipt purchase date to back-fill historical receipts.

Verified end-to-end: valid_api_keys() used by main.py middleware, proxy.py, satellite.py; setup merge/payload/count + template macro/JS all present. Multi-key works; removing one key disconnects only that client.
Satellite keys can be named via extra_api_key_names (index-aligned); merge handles rename/keep/add; unit-tested. Committed.
Added AI_MODELS catalog + ai_model_field macro: provider-dependent dropdown with capability notes and Custom override, wired in wizard and settings pane. Full render test passes. Committed.

Root cause: beads JSONL auto-export was disabled, so .beads/issues.jsonl (the dashboard data source on GitHub raw) froze at 208 issues while the Dolt DB grew to 244. Enabled export.auto + export.git-add and refreshed the export to 244 issues with correct statuses. Pushed to main so the live dashboard now reflects current bead state.

Hoisted 'from .hardware import is_raspberry_pi' to module scope in config.py so features() no longer runs a per-render import. is_raspberry_pi() is lru_cached and reads no files until called, so the module-level import has zero import-time cost. features() is now a cheap dict build on the theme_context() hot path. Full test suite green (434 passed).

Pinned google-api-python-client==2.197.0 in service/requirements.txt. google-generativeai 0.8.3 depends on it directly, and the index carries the non-normalized 1.0beta5prerelease2 wheel that pip 25.3 hard-errors on. Pin keeps the 1.x/beta line out of the resolution. Verified compatible via pip --dry-run --no-deps.

Disabled the FoodAssistant Cloud (subscription) tunnel_mode radio in setup.html: input now disabled, row greyed (opacity .55), badge changed from Subscription to Coming soon, and intro text notes coming soon. Visible-but-non-interactive until cloud epic uad ships. Smoke route tests green.

Already implemented in setup.html. The wizard API Key row shows a persistent warning ('Save this key somewhere safe now ... masked after you save and will not be shown in full again') and Generate triggers showGeneratedSecret(), a prominent one-time alert ('Copy it now — it is hidden once you save') with a clipboard Copy button (copyText() has an HTTP-safe execCommand fallback). Covers the pi_hosted primary-key path. No further work needed.

Root cause: base.html and the login/pin/setup templates loaded Bootstrap CSS, the Bootstrap JS bundle, and Bootstrap Icons from cdn.jsdelivr.net. On a self-hosted appliance with flaky/no internet the CDN requests fail intermittently, so a refresh renders without the theme stylesheet and looks reverted to default. Switched all four templates to the already-vendored static/vendor/bootstrap*.{css,js} + bootstrap-icons.min.css (served via the /static mount, base href resolves the relative paths). Also replaced the corrupt 103-byte placeholder icon fonts (they held a CDN egress-block error string) with the real v1.11.3 woff/woff2. Full suite green (434); vendored assets verified serving 200 with real content.

Added a .install-log CSS rule (max-height:14rem; overflow:auto; white-space:pre-wrap) in setup.html. The panels previously had no height cap so streaming output grew the <pre> unbounded and lengthened the page. The existing _refreshInstallLog tailer already auto-scrolls to the bottom when the user is at the bottom, so capping the height turns them into stable fixed-height scroll regions. Smoke render tests green.

Removed the Display section from pane-interface in setup.html. It was gated {% if not is_pi %}, so it only appeared on headless/browser devices where kiosk Scale and CSS Orientation do nothing (the dead entry). Devices with a panel (is_pi) keep the full Display pane: Scale, display type, touch, calibrate, and KMS Orientation (setKmsRotation). Removal also eliminated a duplicate ui_scale element id. Smoke render tests green.

Added a help block to the settings Grocy pane (pane-inventory) in setup.html: a plain explanation of what Grocy is and why its URL + API key are needed, links to grocy.info docs and the FoodAssistant install guide, the API-key location (Settings then Manage API keys), and on pi_hosted the default http://<hostname>.local:9383 URL. Smoke render tests green.

Added service/app/templates/ai-declarations.html, a GET /ui/ai-declarations route in routers/ui.py, and a link in the base.html overflow menu next to About. Content honestly states LLMs were used as a development tool, the program is mainly real human work validated with thorough testing on real hardware, plus a plain security note about caution installing software on your network. No em-dashes or LLM-tell phrasing. Template renders; full suite green (434).

Vendored html5-qrcode 2.3.8 into service/app/static/vendor/html5-qrcode.min.js (extracted from the npm registry tarball, identical to the unpkg file) and pointed add.html at static/vendor/html5-qrcode.min.js. Verified it serves 200 (375KB) and still exposes the Html5Qrcode global. No external CDN/unpkg refs remain in any template; the UI is now fully self-hosted. Smoke tests green.

Fixed by isolating data_dir to a tmp_path in the satellite_mode fixture. Root cause: settings.save() (invoked via _record_last_sync during sync) calls apply(existing), which re-overlays all _SAVEABLE fields from the real /app/data/settings.json onto the live settings, clobbering the grocy_base_url the pull just applied. The real file held a stale 'http://g', so the test failed standalone but passed in the full suite where an earlier test left the expected value. With per-test data_dir isolation, test_satellite.py now passes alone (12) and in the full suite (434).

Confirmed resolved on current main by the satellite sync-status work (yz6), as the bead anticipated. Chain: server /api/config/satellite returns all SATELLITE_PULL_FIELDS including mealie_base_url/api_key/public_url; the satellite re-pulls every satellite_sync_minutes (default 15) via _periodic_satellite_sync; _apply_config applies the fields to live settings; mealie_configured() is a stateless bool(mealie_base_url and mealie_api_key) with no cached unavailable state. So a Mealie started on the host after setup becomes available within one sync interval, no restart. Added regression test test_sync_picks_up_mealie_started_after_setup (mealie_configured False to True across a sync). Full suite 435 green.
Extended kiosk-hide to phone QR, Defaults, About, AI Declarations; Settings stays visible
Added /system/health bridge endpoint (vcgencmd throttle decode, temp, disk) + app proxy + non-obtrusive navbar warning icon; pure parsers unit-tested
Surfaced bridge key_count detection in setup UI: prefills model dropdown, reveals opts, shows auto-detected hint in wizard + settings; added bridge keycount tests

Weather location/units promoted to app settings + SATELLITE_PULL_FIELDS; satellite read-modify-writes config.toml via bridge on sync; UI read-only on satellite; proxies overlay synced values. Also fixed SetupPayload dropping idle_timeout/key_overrides
Added theme.py palette module; controller applies themed_color per action role; theme stamped into config.toml on all deck config writes and on theme change; satellite sync pushes theme on pull
Added StreamDeckProfile DB model, CRUD endpoints, satellite sync via _apply_profiles(), and profile picker UI in the Stream Deck settings pane with load/save/delete and deck-size filtering

APP_VERSION is the single source of truth; pre-commit hook (install-git-hooks.sh, chained onto beads) auto-bumps patch each commit and is self-proving (this work bumped 0.6.0->0.6.1); bump-version.sh handles minor/major; semver guard test added; workflow documented in CLAUDE.md

Host bridge owns kiosk display blanking (idle loop + vcgencmd/xset) and brokers activity. Browser kiosk-idle.js and the Stream Deck controller both report activity to the bridge; controller polls it. A screen touch or deck press wakes both surfaces; timeouts stay independent. App proxies activity/blank/wake and pushes display_idle_timeout on save+startup. Tested: bridge pure helpers, controller cross-wake, off-Pi endpoints.

Floating nav menu in base.html with corner docking, drag-to-reposition snapping to nearest corner, per-device localStorage override of a server default position, and auto-hide when has_streamdeck. Settings control in Interface pane; fields persist via /save with position validated. floating-nav.js + CSS; smoke tests for persistence/validation/render.

Settings sidebar regrouped into Services / App / Devices & Hardware / System headers (was a flat list). Only nav pills reordered; panes and save paths untouched. Satellite and is_pi visibility gating preserved. Menu-group render test added.

Weather/forecast deck keys now navigate the kiosk to /ui/weather (new wttr.in forecast page) in addition to cycling the face; tests updated.
HA cameras bound to entity + fetched with bearer header: app proxy for kiosk page, deck fetches HA directly; legacy token-baked URLs auto-recovered. Tests added (775 pass).

AP watchdog skips the setup hotspot when Ethernet (or any default route) provides connectivity; host bridge reports wired status and the Network pane shows an Ethernet Connected badge. Existing devices need the updated firstboot watchdog redeployed.

AP watchdog skips the setup hotspot when Ethernet (or any default route) provides connectivity; host bridge reports wired status and the Network pane shows an Ethernet Connected badge. Existing devices need the updated firstboot watchdog redeployed.

Interface scale control now restarts the kiosk via the host bridge after saving, so a scale/orientation change applies to the attached display without a reboot (mirrors the Display pane). Software-side fix; visual result still best confirmed on-device.
Media override type: HA media_player transport keys (play/pause/next/prev/vol/stop) via a stateless ha_service kind. Tests added.

Scanner mode (Stock/Use/Shop): server mode state + endpoints, /pending/scan routes by mode (inventory unchanged, consume via Grocy, shopping via Mealie), scan_mode deck key shows + cycles the mode. Tests added. Audit (ugku) deferred.

Custom keys reworked into a drag-and-drop library: defined once (no slot), shown as palette chips, dragged onto the grid (slot derived from placement), unplaced ones kept with slot -1. Deck ignores id and skips unplaced. JS syntax-checked; deck tests pass (784 total).

Shipped: HA event channel (services/ha_events.py + routers/events.py) for notifications + camera pop-ups gated by ha_events_enabled, with ha-events.js rendering toasts/overlay; Convert is a nav tab with device-local custom rows. Backend unit-tested (9), JS verified in headless Chromium, all 795 tests pass.

Shipped: HA event channel (services/ha_events.py + routers/events.py) for notifications + camera pop-ups gated by ha_events_enabled, with ha-events.js rendering toasts/overlay; Convert is a nav tab with device-local custom rows. Backend unit-tested (9), JS verified in headless Chromium, all 795 tests pass.

Shipped: HA event channel (services/ha_events.py + routers/events.py) for notifications + camera pop-ups gated by ha_events_enabled, with ha-events.js rendering toasts/overlay; Convert is a nav tab with device-local custom rows. Backend unit-tested (9), JS verified in headless Chromium, all 795 tests pass.

Staple matching now ignores measurement/quantity tokens (_MEASURE_TOKENS) in both pathways; default staples list broadened. Verified: verbose all-staple recipes land in the staples tier; 802 tests pass.

Implemented as two free-text include/avoid fields on the Cook tuning panel (v0.6.87). AI-only steering.
Added /ui/kitchen-guide static reference page (v0.6.88): safe temps, doneness, substitutions, technique tips, oven chart. Scope resolved to a standalone reference page like Convert.
Implemented Part 1 (declare appliances, steer AI) as Cook appliance pills (v0.6.89). Part 2 (recommend/buy appliances) is deferred to the affiliate decision (k2kv), which still needs feedback.

Added Use it up on the Expiring page + /mealie/use-it-up endpoint (v0.6.90). AI recipe ideas focused on expiring items plus always-on static tips (stocks, freezing, pesto). UX resolved: button on the Expiring page, AI-with-static-fallback.
Added to the interactive demo (Expiring, Meal Plan, Settings screens).
Added to the interactive demo (Expiring, Meal Plan, Settings screens).
Added to the interactive demo (Expiring, Meal Plan, Settings screens).

install_kiosk now installs+enables seatd, adds the kiosk user to _seatd, and sets LIBSEAT_BACKEND=seatd on the unit (v0.6.92). Idempotent; covers Pi Remote and Pi Hosted (both re-run firstboot install_kiosk). Verify on-device that foodassistant-kiosk.service no longer crash-loops and cage gets a DRM session.

Added dsi_7inch display type (v0.6.93): firstboot writes dtoverlay=vc4-kms-dsi-7inch (optional invx/invy via DSI_TOUCH_INVERT) + Goodix touch calibration, mirroring the Waveshare path; wizard offers it via DISPLAY_TYPES. Verify on the test Pi: select 'MIPI DSI 7-inch' in setup, reprovision/reboot, confirm the panel lights and touch works.

Added foodassistant-display-power (wlr-randr --off/--on) and made the host bridge prefer it over vcgencmd for blank/wake (v0.6.94), so blanking no longer drops the cage kiosk to the console. Falls back to vcgencmd/xset when the compositor helper is unavailable. Verify on the test Pi: set a short display timeout, let it blank, confirm it wakes back to the kiosk (not the console) without a reboot.
Fixed in v0.6.95: docker service hostnames (grocy/mealie/ollama) now rewrite to the LAN host:port for browser links; generic display type relabeled to 'Generic display'.
Fixed in v0.6.95: docker service hostnames (grocy/mealie/ollama) now rewrite to the LAN host:port for browser links; generic display type relabeled to 'Generic display'.

Setup redirect now preserves kiosk=1 onto /setup (v0.6.96), so the appliance display latches kiosk mode and polls kiosk/navigate/pending; it auto-navigates to the dashboard when setup completes from another browser. Verify on the Pi Host: complete setup from a phone, confirm the attached display leaves the wizard on its own.

kiosk-auto.js now gates auto-enable on a loopback hostname (v0.6.97), so only the appliance's own display (loaded over localhost by the kiosk service) enters kiosk mode; remote phone/laptop browsers no longer inherit the display rotation/scale. Note: a browser that already latched kioskMode stays rotated until kiosk mode is toggled off (nav tablet icon) or site data is cleared.

Satellite server-scan now filters out pi_remote/satellite modes (v0.6.98), so the device no longer lists itself. Verify on the Pi Remote: rescan and confirm only the Pi Host (server/pi_hosted) appears.

Bridge hardware-status now includes streamdeck.key_count (v0.6.99); the wizard's existing DOMContentLoaded auto-detect pre-selects the deck size. Verify on the Pi: open the setup wizard with the deck attached and confirm the key-count select matches the model.

Preset deck timers now POST /timers so they appear on the web /timers page and satellites (v0.6.100). Recipe-suggestion timers already synced. The stock timer_1/2/3 +1-min accumulate keys remain deck-local (duration grows per press, no clean one-shot mapping). Verify on the Pi: press a preset timer key (e.g. eggs) and confirm it shows on /timers.

Stream Deck info-heavy keys (clock, weather, forecast, meal_today/info) now render their multi-character value across the full key face. Added render.text_only_kind() set and a text_only flag on render_key() that suppresses the main icon for those kinds; controller passes text_only=render.text_only_kind(spec.kind). Normal icon-forward keys unchanged. Added 3 unit tests; all 826 tests pass. Commit 333814b.
Added hand-authored teal fridge favicon (SVG + 32/16 PNG + ICO) and wired link tags into base, setup, login, pin heads. 823 tests pass.

Gated Remote Access nav pill + #pane-tunnel pane behind {% if not is_satellite %} in setup.html; added is_satellite to setup_page context; guarded tunnel init JS. Added test_remote_access_pane_hidden_on_satellite. 824 tests pass. Commit 6e625dd.

Consolidated duplicate software-update controls. Removed the duplicate update card from the satellite Main Server pane; the Backup & Updates pane is now the single home. On a satellite it shows the working self-update control (POST /setup/update via checkForUpdates); server/pi_hosted keep the existing manual docker/git instructions (admin/check-update). Gated by is_satellite. Tests pass (828), templates render. Commit 190df6c.

Editor now pre-populates the grid with the default key layout, sourced from streamdeck layout.default_key_names (build_pages over DEFAULT_ORDER). --dump-actions emits {actions, default_keys}; bridge passes both through; JS seeds _sdKeys from default_keys when config has no saved keys. Saved keys and overrides untouched. Tests added; all 830+ pass. Commit adfe5bd.

At large/xlarge UI scale on a small/kiosk panel (max-width 991.98px + data-ui-scale 1.2/1.4) where the floating nav is the active surface (floating-nav.js now sets data-floatnav-active on <html>), the top navbar collapses to a slim brand-only strip and the primary tab row, toggler, and body top offset shrink, handing the reclaimed space to content. Floating nav remains the single nav surface. Normal scale, phones, desktop, and panels without the floating nav keep the full navbar so all destinations stay reachable. Measured at 1.4x on 800x480: nav chrome dropped from ~46% to ~36% of the effective viewport. All 828 tests pass.

Redone correctly (v0.6.118): the editor now mirrors the deck's RESOLVED config (defaults to full DEFAULT_ORDER, invalid keys dropped) via a new --dump-config that the bridge serves, instead of reading raw config.toml. Fixes the blank 15-key editor (no saved keys) and the stale/mismatched 32-key editor. Also stopped the grid render from truncating off-page keys so editing a small (paginated) deck no longer drops later pages on save.
Stream Deck pane revamped (v0.6.119): Save settings + Restart bar added at the TOP of the editor (status mirrored to both top and bottom), attached-hardware detection moved to the bottom of the pane.

Multi-page editing added (v0.6.120): the grid now has page nav (prev/next, 'Page X of N', Add page) and renders the current page's editable slots mapped to the right indices in the flat keys list, with the reserved auto 'More' key shown but not editable. Pagination math mirrors layout.build_pages exactly (cross-checked), so editor pages match the deck and off-page keys survive a save.

create_recipe now sends recipeInstructions as {text, ingredientReferences: []} (v0.6.122), valid on Mealie 3.19+ (required) and older versions. Fixes the 500 TypeError when cooking/importing a web recipe on the Pi Host's Mealie 3.19.2.
Multi-line labels now render as a fitted, on-key block (v0.6.123); the screen-off key's second line no longer falls off. Verified by render + a regression test.
Recipe timer keys now mirror running shared timers as a live countdown; pressing an active recipe timer jumps the kiosk to the Current Recipe page
Clock and weather/forecast keys now render a richer feature face: gradient, corner glyph accent, and a two-tier emphasized value layout
Made streamdeck_key_style and streamdeck_icon_color device-local (removed from SATELLITE_PULL_FIELDS and _STREAMDECK_SYNCED_FIELDS) so a satellite can set its own deck appearance and it sticks
App rejects barcodes >24 chars (concatenation guard); documented HA automation self-heals the buffer past 24 chars + guidance for non-28 Enter terminators
Added /events/navigate + navigate event type handled by the kiosk poller; same-origin guarded
Server advertises server_hostname; satellite caches remote_server_host and falls back to <host>.local when the configured IP fails (complements the xwn0 cached-IP fallback)
Disclaimers partial added and shown on About: food safety, AI hallucination, allergens, no professional advice
Persistent action_items store + inbox API + Pending-page UI (collapses when empty); food-expired generator with dedupe/auto-archive
Persistent action_items store + inbox API + Pending-page UI (collapses when empty); food-expired generator with dedupe/auto-archive
Active recipe persisted to disk; Cooked/Clear actions; Cooked raises a leftover_prompt action item; saving it creates a short-expiry Grocy product
Active recipe persisted to disk; Cooked/Clear actions; Cooked raises a leftover_prompt action item; saving it creates a short-expiry Grocy product
Shared version_compare util used by the update checker; Devices page shows per-satellite update status vs the server version
Multi-recipe collection (primary + courses) with per-slot scale/cook/clear; In Progress page + nav; Add course on Cook page; collection persistence with legacy migration
Merged into On the Line tab with course selector; Pending renamed Inbox; dual red/yellow nav badge
Merged into On the Line tab with course selector; Pending renamed Inbox; dual red/yellow nav badge
Merged into On the Line tab with course selector; Pending renamed Inbox; dual red/yellow nav badge

Not a code regression: classify_recipes correctly tiers a staple-only recipe (verified). The tier is empty because the user's current Mealie recipes each need a fresh item not in stock or staples; adding on-hand items to Settings>Pantry Staples populates it
pi-remote settings banner; satellite version traffic-light (same/patch/major_minor); HA optional note
pi-remote settings banner; satellite version traffic-light (same/patch/major_minor); HA optional note
HA keys section removed (use custom keys); custom keys moved below editor; reset-to-default button added
Preview button per discovered camera + /ui/camera/preview by-entity snapshot proxy + modal
HA optional note added; notifications setup eased with auto-filled device URL + copy buttons on the rest_command/automation snippets
Combined Mealie+web pool classified into unified tiers so With Pantry Staples (and Ready/Shopping) include web recipes
Copycat button generates a restaurant-dish copycat via the AI generate path
utensils.detect_equipment + missing_appliances; /current-recipe/equipment endpoint; equipment chips on the On the Line page with missing-appliance flag
check-update reads APP_VERSION from main (raw config.py) with a tag fallback, so untagged patch releases are detected
Archive all endpoint+button; Cook/Add-course on external recipes via external-detail -> set_active/add_recipe without saving to Mealie
Archive all endpoint+button; Cook/Add-course on external recipes via external-detail -> set_active/add_recipe without saving to Mealie
camera_scan service + /setup/cameras/scan endpoint + Scan-network UI with Preview/Add; brand snapshot-path probing, RTSP-only flagged
Weather page renders server-side from wttr.in j1 JSON (new /ui/weather/data + weather service) instead of the unreliable browser-loaded PNG

Gated AI, Recipes (Mealie), and Barcode setup panes read-only on a satellite (features.satellite): inputs/textareas readonly, selects/checkboxes disabled, per-pane Save buttons replaced with managed-on-server notes, matching the HA/Cameras panes. Added tests/test_satellite_readonly_panes.py. Pushed in 6eab917.
Raised kiosk barcode-capture gap to 300ms (was 50) so USB scanner jitter no longer splits a scan; added GTIN check-digit guard rejecting corrupt full-length reads

Added Stream Deck dynamic shopping quick-check page: new shopping_check_page entry action plus a controller mode whose keys populate from the top unchecked Mealie shopping items (label = item name, truncated). Pressing a key checks the item off via the existing PUT /mealie/shopping/items/{id} (reused, no new app endpoint), then refreshes; a Back key exits. Pure mapping/truncation logic and async fetch/check helpers live in actions.py with unit tests; controller flow covered via FakeDeck. Full suite 941 passed. On-device deck-render verification pending (no physical deck).
Food-intake tracker: intake_log table + nutrition service (daily totals) + /nutrition API + Nutrition page; estimate_nutrition added to the provider ABC and all 4 providers
Redesigned weather page with condition icons and themed hero layout

Implemented app-side pantry audit mode: in-memory audit session service (services/audit.py, pure + unit-tested), /audit router (locations/start/scan/status/stop with satellite forwarding), 'audit' scanner mode wired into pending/scan (records seen, never queues or writes to Grocy), /ui/audit kiosk page (pick location, live status of expected vs scanned, missing/unexpected), and a nav tab. Full suite 964 passing. Follow-up deferred for on-device work: wire a Stream Deck key to toggle audit mode (needs the physical deck to verify).
Hide the Chromium-rendered cursor via kiosk.css gated on pointer:coarse/none, covering the case the compositor XCURSOR theme misses
Satellite Updates card now passively detects availability via admin/check-update (network-based, independent of local git), auto-run on load, with a separate Update now OTA button
Kiosk shows a 'finish setup from your phone/PC' panel with a LAN URL and QR before setup is done, with an opt-out to continue on screen

Tightened weather page: hero icon/temp shrunk (3rem/2.8rem), denser stats, day cards now single non-wrapping flex row with 1.3rem icons and reduced padding so a 7in 1024x600 landscape fits without scrolling

Pending page now shows an info badge when a scanned item is already in Grocy stock; non-blocking. Verified separate-by-day already works (add_stock posts per-item best_before_date and Grocy keys stock by best-before date) and added a regression test.

Stream Deck camera key now carries its camera name to the kiosk as a ?cam= query param; /ui/camera resolves cam (index or name) to an initial index via cameras.resolve_camera_index and the page opens that feed instead of always camera 0. Added regression tests (cameras.resolve_camera_index, actions.camera_target_path, dispatch carry-through, and a /ui/camera?cam= TestClient render check). No hardware-dependent residue: the fix is entirely in the app-side carry-through (the deck firmware just navigates the kiosk URL).

Audited README, docs/api.md, CHANGELOG, CLAUDE.md against current code; documented audit/nutrition/weather/convert/kitchen-guide pages, On the Line rename, audit scanner mode, and new endpoints. Pushed to main.

In-app one-button updater now works on Pi Hosted too (Docker pull+recreate via the OTA helper), not just Pi Remote; endpoint and Updates card generalized to is_pi_appliance with auto availability check
Replaced the read-only weather controls on the satellite Stream Deck pane with a note pointing to the main server; values kept as hidden inputs so deck save still reports them
Added debug logging: a rotating file handler under data_dir/logs, a Settings Diagnostics card to toggle it, and a redacted log download via /admin/logs/download

Added custom nav tabs + submenu nesting. Data model: settings.custom_nav_tabs (list of {id,label,icon,url,parent}) for user-created tabs and settings.nav_parents (child->parent map) for nesting built-in tabs; both in _SAVEABLE and device-local (not satellite-pulled). navigation.py gained normalize_custom_tabs, build_nav_tree (one level deep, orphan parents fall back to top level), and custom-aware visible_tabs/all_tabs. base.html primary navbar renders parents with children as Bootstrap dropdowns. Settings nav editor adds a parent selector per row plus an Add/Remove custom tab form. setup.py /save validates both fields. Tests added for normalization, dedupe, tree building, and a TestClient render smoke test.

Auto-updates on by default fleet-wide: global auto_update flag (in SATELLITE_PULL_FIELDS so remotes inherit it), Watchtower for non-Pi servers, a Pi-appliance scheduler that applies the host-bridge OTA, and satellite gating on the server version so server+remotes converge

Weather day cards now expand on click to show hourly strip + high/low, rain chance, wind, sunrise/sunset. Added Open-Meteo daily (precipitation_probability_max, wind_speed_10m_max, sunrise, sunset) + hourly fields, wttr.in fallback populates its subset, missing fields degrade gracefully. Pure parse tests added/extended.

Grouped default nav via DEFAULT_NAV_PARENTS baseline in navigation.py: Expiring+Audit under Inventory, Cook+On the Line+Meal Plan under Recipes, Convert+Nutrition+Camera under Kitchen Guide. Primary daily-use tabs (Inventory, Add, Inbox, Shopping, Recipes) stay top level. Chosen because it keeps the high-frequency tabs one click away while collapsing secondary stock views, the cooking workflow, and reference tools into three logical parents whose own pages stay reachable. effective_nav_parents() makes this only a baseline; any saved nav_parents wins wholesale. Flat reachable list unchanged so floating nav and overflow still reach every page.

nvp3: added docs/settings-matrix.md derived from config.py (_SAVEABLE/SATELLITE_PULL_FIELDS/SECRET_SETTING_KEYS), linked from README and platforms.md. 8ekf: documentation audit covering auto_update/Watchtower/in-app updater/debug logging/custom nav+submenus/kiosk cursor; added missing CHANGELOG, README, api.md, platforms.md, CLAUDE.md entries; confirmed no author-to-user question-style prose remains.

nvp3: added docs/settings-matrix.md derived from config.py (_SAVEABLE/SATELLITE_PULL_FIELDS/SECRET_SETTING_KEYS), linked from README and platforms.md. 8ekf: documentation audit covering auto_update/Watchtower/in-app updater/debug logging/custom nav+submenus/kiosk cursor; added missing CHANGELOG, README, api.md, platforms.md, CLAUDE.md entries; confirmed no author-to-user question-style prose remains.

Audited all P0/P1 security/update beads, all bare-Closed beads, and ~40 recent feature/bug beads against the code plus full suite (1014 passing). Every audited bead verified IMPLEMENTED; no premature closures. Two apparent discrepancies traced to benign relocations (zj3m to about.html, i3cz router-vs-service wording).

Replaced the per-row parent dropdown nav editor with a drag-and-drop tree (native HTML5 DnD, no external libs) plus touch-friendly move up/down/indent/outdent buttons. Added headings/folders: a custom tab with an empty url and heading=true that groups children and has no page of its own. Model: normalize_custom_tabs now keeps a label-only entry as a heading (href cleared); build_nav_tree drops a childless heading and base.html renders a heading parent as a label-only dropdown (no leading open-the-page item). nav_parents now accepts a custom_ heading as a parent so built-ins can be filed under a folder. Headings are skipped in the flat overflow and float nav (no page), every page stays reachable. Design choice noted: a childless heading is hidden rather than shown as an empty dropdown. Tests added in tests/test_navigation.py incl. a TestClient render check; full suite green (1029).

Added a Release notes link to the Updates card (all modes) and a server Update now button that triggers Watchtower's HTTP API immediately; endpoint /setup/update-server, compose enables the API with a shared token

Added a Release notes link to the Updates card (all modes) and a server Update now button that triggers Watchtower's HTTP API immediately; endpoint /setup/update-server, compose enables the API with a shared token

Delivered the full gap analysis vs Grocy/Mealie/Tandoor/KitchenOwl and filed 11 opportunity beads (SECURITY/CONTRIBUTING/CODE_OF_CONDUCT/templates/dependabot/pre-commit/coverage done in fca471f; SHA-pin v9ac, docs-site hzdp, i18n eogw, lockfile s6zj queued).

Implemented by tu0i + k2kk: host-bridge OTA surfaced in the Updates card for both Pi Hosted and Pi Remote (is_pi_appliance), with availability check and fleet auto-update. Remaining on-device verification tracked by 65u6.

Pinned all GitHub Actions to commit SHAs across ci.yml, publish-image.yml, release-image.yml. Pinned: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 (v4), actions/setup-python@a26af69be951a213d495a4c3e4e4022e16d87065 (v5), actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 (v4), softprops/action-gh-release@3bb12739c298aeb8a4eeaf626c5b8d85266b0e65 (v2), docker/setup-qemu-action@c7c53464625b32c7a7e944ae62b3e17d2b600130 (v3), docker/setup-buildx-action@8d2750c68a42422c14e847fe6c8ac0403b4cbd6f (v3), docker/login-action@c94ce9fb468520275223c153574b00df6fe4bcc9 (v3), docker/metadata-action@c299e40c65443455700f0fdfc63efafe5b349051 (v5), docker/build-push-action@10e90e3645eae34f1e60eeb005ba3a3d33f178e8 (v6). None left on tags; all resolved via GitHub API.

Implemented affiliate product recommendations: Shop page (/ui/shop) with Amazon links tied to un-owned appliances and recipe-missing equipment, amazon_affiliate_tag setting (synced to satellites), pure tested affiliate service, FTC disclosure. Pushed as 3da6597 on origin/main.

Web-UI password and kiosk PIN are now salted-scrypt hashed at rest: config.save() hashes them before persisting, login and PIN verify via verify_secret, legacy plaintext values still verify and auto-upgrade to a hash on the next successful login. API keys and TOTP secret remain plaintext by necessity (bearer secrets). Tested.

Added an audible timer-completion chime (Web Audio, no asset) in the timer window plus a device-local Quiet mode toggle that silences it so a finished timer is signalled only by the highlighted row. Setting in Settings Interface, flag exposed on base.html data-quiet-mode for timer-window.js. Tested.

Decision: defer UI internationalization for now. FoodAssistant is a single-maintainer, noncommercial self-hosted appliance with a small English-speaking audience; i18n (gettext/Babel + a Weblate/Crowdin pipeline like the larger peers) is a large, ongoing commitment with low ROI at this stage. Revisit if there is real demand. Strings stay inline in the Jinja templates until then.

s6zj: generated hash-locked service/requirements.lock with uv (anthropic pinned to ==0.113.0); README documents regeneration. hzdp: added root mkdocs.yml (Material theme) wiring existing docs/ files into a nav; README notes mkdocs serve, dev-only.

s6zj: generated hash-locked service/requirements.lock with uv (anthropic pinned to ==0.113.0); README documents regeneration. hzdp: added root mkdocs.yml (Material theme) wiring existing docs/ files into a nav; README notes mkdocs serve, dev-only.

Added hardware capability detection (board_tier, total_ram_mb, supports_local_stack in hardware.py with FOODASSISTANT_FORCE_RAM_MB override). Rules: a low-tier Pi family (Pi 0/1/2/3, Zero) or a board with total RAM under MIN_HOSTED_RAM_MB (3500 MB, ~the 4GB floor after firmware reservation) cannot run the local stack, so available_modes() drops Pi Hosted and offers Pi Remote only; Pi 4/5 with >=3500MB offers both. Uncertain detection (unknown tier or unreadable RAM) returns supported=True so a capable box is never over-restricted. Off-Pi behavior unchanged (server only). Setup wizard shows a why-line when Pi Hosted is hidden.
Fixed: atomic settings write plus corrupt-file preservation; regression tests in tests/test_settings_save_safety.py; full suite 1074 green
Fixed: secret_input gates readonly on SATELLITE_PULL_FIELDS so device-local secrets stay editable on a satellite; regression test added; 1076 green
Fixed: savePaneSecurity now posts extra_api_keys; lan_scan.default_cidr prefers a real LAN and flags docker-ish results; full suite 1076 green
Fixed: savePaneSecurity now posts extra_api_keys; lan_scan.default_cidr prefers a real LAN and flags docker-ish results; full suite 1076 green
Fixed: /health exposes device_id; scan skips self + docker hits; blank scan falls back to a satellite's LAN /24; tests added; 1078 green

Implemented: _lan_cidr_from_config_urls derives LAN from Grocy/Mealie URLs; resolution falls through interface/satellite/config-url; resolved range remembered in lan_scan_cidr; tests added; 1081 green

Un-gated the shared update/sync/diagnostics functions from the wizard-only block; verified in headless Chromium (no page errors, functions defined, check returns latest); regression test added; 1082 green

Added pasta roller, pasta extruder, and a stand-mixer attachments group (7 KitchenAid attachments) to the appliance catalog, wired into _appliance_groups + setup.html checklist and the affiliate PRODUCT_CATALOG with search terms.
Shop page now pins a Recommended for you section of un-owned/recipe-missing picks and badges highlighted items; affiliate.top_recommendations + highlighted flag drive it.
Added AMAZON_STOREFRONT_URL config constant (env override, empty default) and render a storefront link on the Shop page only when set.

Release-notes link now points at the CHANGELOG on main (always current) instead of GitHub Releases, which is stuck at v0.6.0 because version tags cannot be pushed from the cloud git proxy. Pushing the v0.7.x tags from a machine with git access (which also triggers the release workflow) remains the way to populate GitHub Releases.

Added 4 themes: iOS Light (#007aff, system font, rounded), iOS Dark (#0a84ff dark greys), Outrun (magenta/teal neon) and Vaporwave (pastel pink/cyan neon). All as vendored overlay CSS under static/vendor/themes/, registered in config.py THEMES, with matching Stream Deck THEME_PALETTES entries. Added tests/test_themes.py for THEMES well-formedness.

Readability audit (WCAG AA) of existing themes. Solarized (warm light) was the main offender and got fixes: secondary/muted text now solid #4a5d63 / #586e75 (was 0.70/0.45 alpha = 2.80 contrast, now 6.4/5.0); links darkened #268bd2->#0f5a8a (3.41->6.83); badge backgrounds darkened a step so white text clears AA (warn/success/cyan/primary/info/danger were 2.9-4.3, now 4.8-5.7). Also fixed two of the new neon themes during the same pass: Outrun primary+danger badges and Vaporwave danger badge switched white->dark text (were 2.9-3.5, now 5.0-6.5). synthwave/midnight/forest already passed AA for body, secondary text, nav, badges and inputs (7-16:1) so were left unchanged. darkly/cyborg/flatly are vendored Bootswatch min.css, AA-tuned upstream, no overlay slot, left as-is.
Unsaved-changes warning: settings edits mark the page dirty, a successful save (any pane endpoint) clears it, and beforeunload warns only when dirty. Init is excluded via a settle delay.

Camera scan now uses lan_scan.resolve_lan_cidr (shared with the device scan): inherits the LAN from Grocy/Mealie URLs, prefers a real interface over Docker, and remembers the range in lan_scan_cidr. Tests added; 1092 green.

Fixed in this batch: mealie endpoints added to setup-bypass (wizard JSON), shopping endpoint returns JSON on error instead of 500, Mealie internal URL field defaults to localhost (open-link keeps the .local browser address), Grocy pi-hosted note added, affiliate disclosure reworded to friendly support language. Tests green (1092).

Phone setup URL now prefers the LAN IP over <hostname>.local (mDNS often does not resolve, which is why the address was unreachable and the QR led nowhere); the QR encodes that reachable URL. QR endpoint verified rendering with the url param.

Server Update now now fails fast (4s connect timeout) with a clear message that the Watchtower updater is not running and how to add it, instead of hanging until a reverse proxy cut the request and showed a generic 'could not reach the server'. Root cause on korolev: the watchtower container is not running (their compose predates it). Adding the watchtower service from the current prod compose enables it.

Added a Personalization sidebar group on the Settings page (setup.html, no separate page). Under Personalization: Interface (whole pane, id kept pane-interface), Recipe Preferences (suggestion tuning + appliances checklist -> pane-personalization-recipes, savePaneRecipePrefs; satellite read-only), Storage Categories (custom storage cats -> pane-personalization-storage, non-satellite), Stream Deck Weather (-> pane-personalization-weather, non-satellite). Settings keeps Grocy connection, AI, Mealie+TheMealDB, Security, Remote Access, Hardware, Home Assistant, Cameras, Satellite Devices, Backup. Save wiring split: savePaneRecipes now only Mealie/External; new savePaneRecipePrefs for moved fields. All pane ids/hash nav preserved; mode gating intact.

Checklist side: the Stand mixer attachments group (data-group=attachment) in the appliances checklist now shows only when appliance_stand_mixer is checked, via syncStandMixerAttachments() on load, on stand_mixer change, and after Select all/Clear. Shop side was already server-filtered.

Added a top Settings|Personalization toggle that shows one side-menu group at a time; defaults to Personalization, remembers the choice, hash-aware. Verified in headless Chromium (no errors, toggling shows the right panes). Tests added; 1100 green.

Update now (both Pi bridge OTA and server Watchtower) now expects the restart: on a dropped connection or a successful trigger it polls /health until the app returns, then reports the new version and reloads, instead of showing 'Failed to fetch' / 'Could not reach the server'. Verified in headless Chromium; 1100 green.

v1 shipped: full-screen /ui/start, 6/15/32 keys that scale to fit, drag-drop palette editor, custom buttons shared with the deck via streamdeck_key_overrides, overrides menus, default off. Deck-only action execution and kiosk-landing tracked as follow-ups.
/ui redirects to first nav page; Start tab defaults to top when enabled; tests added.
